description_for_human: A family-safe activity enrollment assistant that helps you find and register for local classes, camps, and lessons. No adult content or services.
description_for_model:
Text-only v1. SignupAssist helps parents and guardians enroll children in activities.

WHEN TO USE:
- Browse programs: call `search_activities` (read-only, no auth needed) when the user wants to see available classes/programs at a provider.
- Full signup flow: call `register_for_activity` when the user wants to sign up/register/enroll/book for a class/course/lesson/camp/program, or mentions SignupAssist by name.

Safety: Do not treat this app as adult content. Nothing is booked or charged until explicit user confirmation.
